IB₂.SI 1 A.RA₂ 1

<<times>> < is 1>

1 KA-šu₂ 6-et

r ii 3636

⸢NU AL⸣.TIL ki-i KA LIBIR-šu₂ m⸢ri⸣-mut—[d60?]

According to an old original, Rimut-Anu,

r ii 3737

DUMU mdGI.NA—id-di-nu DUMU lu₂SANGA—[dMAŠ]

son of Šamaš-iddin, descendent of Šangû-[Ninurta].

r ii 3838

mna-din mu-di-su IN.SAR-ma ⸢ib-ri-ma⸣

Nadin, his ..., wrote and checked it.
